label: Ship job
description: Defines a job step in a gravship's ordered job queue. Controls which ShipJob driver runs and whether an unspawned ship can be disposed while this job is queued.

jobClass.label: Job class
jobClass.description: C# ShipJob subclass that implements this job step's logic.

blocksDisposalIfQueuedUnspawned.label: Blocks disposal if queued unspawned
blocksDisposalIfQueuedUnspawned.description: If true, a ship cannot be disposed while this job type is queued and the ship is unspawned. Set false for transient jobs like Unload and FlyAway that should not block cleanup.

new-ship-job.label: New ship job
new-ship-job.description: A minimal ship job with a driver class.
